request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found APS-related elements including packages. Need to explore properties to check for deprecated status or similar attributes.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found properties of APS elements. No obvious 'deprecated' property visible. Need to search for packages specifically and check for any deprecation-related attributes or stereotypes.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecat")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found 4 packages with 'deprecated' in their names within the APS model. Three are specifically in the APS hierarchy (Software Architecture, SH Reference Beam Collection, PIT Reference Beam Collection) and one is a general 'deprecated' package. This answers the user's question.
